form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after five months finished third in a small field at Huntingdon on March 18 over 3900m, 47 len behind Snapius with 71.5kg at $4.30. Previously second-up won by 1.0 len Huntingdon on May 20 over 3900m defeating Doc Mccoy with 72.5kg at $4.30 in a hurdle. Has the ability to play a big role.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after four months finished fifth of 11 starters at Warwick on March 8 over 3200m, 18 len behind Wilstar carrying 69kg at $201. Previously second-up made ground from midfield; finished eighth of 10 starters at Hereford on November 25 over 3200m, 37 len behind Four Springs with 66.5kg at $101. Fitter but others look better placed.

form.formComment: Freshened for 34 days. Last start finished seventh of 12 runners at Wincanton on March 5 over 3000m, 12 len behind Thankyouandplease with 72kg at $3.80.
